payload.planText:
# Plan: Stop the endless next dev recompile loop

## Section 4 — Tasks

- [ ] Confirm the bundler and the offending writer
  - Verify dev script bundler and identify which in-root process writes continuously.

- [ ] Add watchOptions.ignored to next.config.ts to exclude tool dirs from the dev file watcher
  - Exclude node_modules, .git, .pi, .cocoindex_code from the webpack dev watcher.

- [ ] [DOCS:traps] Document the dev-watcher recompile-loop gotcha
  - Record that .gitignore does not affect the Next dev watcher and that .pi/.cocoindex_code writes cause recompile loops unless ignored.
